# frozen_string_literal: true

class SessionsController
  def create(user, token)
    Rails.logger.info("login token=#{token} user=#{user.email}")
  end
end

# frozen_string_literal: true

class SessionsController
  def create(user, _token)
    Rails.logger.info("login user_id=#{user.id} token=[REDACTED]")
  end
end
